parsing local result:",e)}})),t}function extractPagination(e){const t={pageLinks:[],currentPage:null,nextPageLink:null};e.querySelectorAll("td").forEach((e=>{const r=e.querySelector("a.fl"),n=e.innerText.trim();r&&n?t.pageLinks.push({page:parseInt(n),url:r.href}):!r&&n&&(t.currentPage=parseInt(n))}));const r=e.querySelector("a#pnnext");return r=t+1,n=e.getAttribute("data-key")||null,o=e.getAttribute("data-lat")||null,c=e.getAttribute("data-lng")||null,l=e.querySelector(".KmZaZb .BTPx6e")?.textContent.trim()||null,i=e.querySelector(".c4RtQd function processQuery(e,t={}){try{const r=await fetchSearchHTML(e,t),n=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(r,"text/html"),o={success:true,query:e,title:extractTitle(r),serp_result_count:extractResultCount(r),organic_results:extractOrganicResults(n),local_results:extractLocalResults(n),pagination:extractPagination(n),relatedSearches:extractRelatedSearches(n),topStories:extractTopStories({doc:n,htmlContent:r}),visualStories:extractVisualStories({doc:n,htmlContent:r}),videoResults:extractVideoResults({doc:n,htmlContent:r}),tweetData:extractTweets(n),hotelResults:extractHotels(n)},c=Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(o).filter((([e,t])=>null!==t&&!(Array.isArray(t)&&0===t.length))));return c.organic_results?.length>0||c.topStories?.length>0||c.videoResults?.length>0||c.visualStories?.length>0||c.local_results?.length>0||c.relatedSearches?.length>0||c.tweetData?.length>0||c.hotelResults?.length>0?c:{error:true,query:e,message:"No meaningful content found"}}catch(t){return{success:false,error:true,query:e,error:t.message}}}function withTimeout(e,t,r,n){return Promise.race([e,new Promise((e=>setTimeout((()=>e({query:r,serpOptions:n,timeout:true,error:"Request timed out after "+t+"ms"})),t)))])}async function fetchWebWithConfig(e,n={}){const o=e.map((e=>processQuery(e,n)));return Promise.all(o)} var serpOpts={hl:'${hl}',gl:'${gl}',sort_by:'${sort_by}',time_period:'${time_period}',device:'${device}',location:'${location}'}; var queryList='${queries}'.split(',').map(function(q){return q.trim()}).filter(function(q){return q.length>0}); var results=await fetchWebWithConfig(queryList,serpOpts); return JSON.stringify(results);
